meta.description: A check or other constraint on a database table.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_c4df663d_81b5_4984_a75f_bed9690f68bf" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "type" TEXT,
    "expression" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_c4df663d_81b5_4984_a75f_bed9690f68bf" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_c4df663d81b54984_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
